name: check_exclusion
description: Check policy exclusions for diagnoses, procedures, and treatments

policy_number.description: Insurance policy number to check exclusions against

diagnosis_codes.description: List of ICD-10 diagnosis codes to check

procedures.description: List of procedure names or CPT codes to check

treatments.description: List of treatment descriptions to check

policy_start_date.description: Policy start date in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD), used for waiting period checks

service_date.description: Date of service in ISO format (YYYY-MM-DD), used for waiting period checks
